rulings.Case Title: HARRY CARPENTER et al VS. CROWN CORK & SEAL COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Or Stay On Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 18, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendants Sepco Corporation and Aurora Pump Company¿s motion to dismiss and alternative motion to stay on grounds of forum non conveniens are denied without prejudice. Defendants failed to demonstrate that North Carolina is a suitable alternative forum because they did not show that all remaining defendants are subject to jurisdiction there. The hearing on this motion will be at 9:30am in Department 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. = (220/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: HARRY CARPENTER et al VS. CROWN CORK & SEAL COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Defendants Aurora Pump Company And Sepco Corporations Motion To Dismiss Or Stay O The Ground Of Forum Non Conveniens Pos
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 18, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Yarway Corporation¿s joinder in defendants Sepco Corporation and Aurora Pump Company¿s motion to dismiss and alternative motion to stay on grounds of forum non conveniens is denied without prejudice. Defendants failed to demonstrate that North Carolina is a suitable alternative forum because they did not show that all remaining defendants are subject to jurisdiction there. The hearing on this motion will be at 9:30am in Dept. 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. = (220/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANK LEE VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Appoint Beverly Lee As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Pltf And For Leave To File 1st Amended Complt
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 18, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 6. Plaintiff¿s motion to appoint Beverly Lee as successor-in-interest to, and substitute successor-in-interest for, deceased plaintiff and for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. The hearing on this motion will be at 9:30am in Department 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. = (220/TLJ)
